title: linum jimenezii subsp. willkommii
intro: Linum jimenezii subsp. willkommii, also known as the Spanish flax, is a subspecies of the flax plant Linum, which is a flowering plant in the family Linaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linum jimenezii subsp. willkommii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, and it is also used as a natural dye.
